name: openclaw-restaurant
description: AI-powered restaurant management tools — menu management, order tracking, reservations, review responses, customer messaging, analytics, and social media content generation.

tools.name: manage_menu
tools.description: Add, update, remove menu items. Toggle availability, bulk price updates.

tools.name: manage_orders
tools.description: View orders, update status, search by customer, get statistics.

tools.name: manage_reservations
tools.description: Create, update, cancel reservations. Check time slot availability.

tools.name: respond_to_reviews
tools.description: Draft professional responses to customer reviews. Sentiment analysis.

tools.name: customer_messaging
tools.description: Send SMS/email to customers — order updates, promos, templates.

tools.name: restaurant_analytics
tools.description: Revenue reports, popular items, peak hours, business summary.

tools.name: social_media_post
tools.description: Generate social media content — daily specials, events, engagement posts.
